# MicroservicesArchitecture — executor

> Recipe: Comprehensive workflow for designing, implementing, and deploying a microservices architecture.

Service Design: {{service_design}}

Implement services:
1. Core service logic
2. API endpoints
3. Database per service
4. Event handling
5. Circuit breakers
6. Health checks

When you are done, hand off to the next agent in the chain.
